name: frontier-alpha-ux-optimization
description: Iterative UI/UX optimization pass — decompose large components, standardize interactions, improve performance, polish micro-interactions. NOT a rebuild — surgical improvements to the existing codebase. Target: perceptibly smoother, faster, more consistent experience.

stack.client: React 19 + Vite 7 + Tailwind 4.1 + Zustand + TanStack Query + Recharts + D3

constraints: NO full rewrites — iterative changes only
ALL existing tests must pass after every story
NO new dependencies unless absolutely justified
ALL colors must use CSS variables (var(--color-*))
ALL animations must use Tailwind config custom animations
Preserve glass morphism design system (.glass-slab, gradients)
Build must pass: cd client && npm run build

userStories.title: Decompose Skeleton.tsx into per-page skeleton files
userStories.description: Skeleton.tsx is 685 lines with 15+ variants crammed in one file. Extract each page skeleton into its own file under components/shared/skeletons/. Wrap each with React.memo() since skeletons are deterministic.
acceptanceCriteria: Skeleton.tsx reduced to <100 lines — only base primitives (SkeletonBlock, SkeletonText, SkeletonCircle)
Each page skeleton in its own file under components/shared/skeletons/
All page skeletons wrapped with React.memo()
Barrel export from skeletons/index.ts
All existing imports updated — no broken references
Zero visual change — skeletons look identical before and after
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Extract TradeExecutor sub-components
userStories.description: TradeExecutor.tsx is 838 lines. Extract into focused sub-components: OrderForm, AccountSummary, OrderPreview, OrderHistory. Keep state management in TradeExecutor as coordinator.
acceptanceCriteria: TradeExecutor.tsx reduced to <300 lines — orchestrator only
OrderForm handles: symbol input, order type, quantity, limit price
AccountSummary shows: buying power, portfolio value, margin
OrderPreview shows: order confirmation details before submit
Each sub-component wrapped with React.memo() where props are stable
Zero visual change — trading UI identical before and after
All existing functionality preserved (preview, submit, cancel)
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Memoize expensive chart renders and add useDeferredValue for quotes
userStories.description: Chart components (EquityCurve, MonteCarloChart, PriceChart, WeightAllocation) re-render on every parent update. Wrap with React.memo() and useMemo for data transforms. Add useDeferredValue for real-time quote updates to prevent blocking renders.
acceptanceCriteria: EquityCurve wrapped with React.memo() — only re-renders when data/dimensions change
MonteCarloChart wrapped with React.memo()
PriceChart wrapped with React.memo()
WeightAllocation wrapped with React.memo()
Data transform in EquityCurve uses useMemo with proper dependency array
PositionList sparkline data generation uses useMemo (not re-computed every render)
Quote updates in Trading page use useDeferredValue to prevent jank
No visual regression — charts render identically
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Standardize all animations to custom Tailwind config
userStories.description: Replace all Tailwind default animate-pulse with custom animate-pulse-subtle from config. Ensure every component uses only the 12 custom animations defined in tailwind.config.js. No inline @keyframes in components.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero instances of animate-pulse (Tailwind default) — all replaced with animate-pulse-subtle or animate-shimmer
All animation durations consistent: enter=0.3s, content=0.4s, emphasis=2s
No inline @keyframes in any TSX file — all in tailwind.config.js or index.css
Skeleton shimmer uses animate-shimmer consistently (not animate-pulse)
Live indicators use animate-pulse-green (not animate-pulse)
Staggered animations use consistent 50ms delay increments
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Add page transition animations and route-level loading
userStories.description: Currently pages pop in without transition. Add a subtle fade-in-up on route change using a shared PageTransition wrapper. Keep it CSS-only — no Framer Motion.
acceptanceCriteria: New PageTransition component wraps page content with animate-fade-in-up (0.3s)
Layout.tsx wraps {children} with <PageTransition>
Transition uses CSS animation (not JS) — respects prefers-reduced-motion
No layout shift during transition (fixed dimensions on container)
Page content appears within 300ms — no perceived delay
Works on both desktop and mobile
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Polish hover/focus micro-interactions across all cards and buttons
userStories.description: Ensure every interactive element has consistent hover feedback: cards get shadow-lg + subtle translateY(-1px), buttons get scale(1.02) on hover and scale(0.98) on active. Focus rings consistent everywhere.
acceptanceCriteria: All Card components: hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-200
All Button components: hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform duration-150
Focus rings: 2px solid var(--color-accent) with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Glass-slab hover: subtle border color brightening (--color-border → --color-border-hover)
Add --color-border-hover CSS variable (slightly brighter than --color-border)
No hover effects on mobile (use @media (hover: hover) media query)
Transitions respect prefers-reduced-motion
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Normalize spacing scale across all components
userStories.description: Create a spacing convention document in index.css and apply it. Cards: p-4 sm:p-6. Sections: gap-4 sm:gap-6. Page padding: p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8. Fix inconsistent spacing in Settings, Trading, Options pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Spacing convention defined as CSS utilities: .space-card (p-4 sm:p-6), .space-section (gap-4 sm:gap-6), .space-page (p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8)
NotificationSettings uses consistent p-4 padding on all sections
APIKeys uses consistent p-4 padding and gap-4 between items
Trading page sections use consistent gap-4 sm:gap-6
Options page sections use consistent spacing
No visual regression — layout proportions look natural
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Fix responsive table overflow and add horizontal scroll on mobile
userStories.description: Tables in Trading (TradeExecutor grid-cols-3) and other data-heavy components break on narrow screens. Add horizontal scroll wrapper for tables that can't be converted to cards.
acceptanceCriteria: New ScrollableTable wrapper: overflow-x-auto with -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch
TradeExecutor grid adapts: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
Tax page data tables wrapped with ScrollableTable on mobile
ML page data grids responsive (stack on mobile, grid on desktop)
Scroll indicator shadow on left/right edges when content overflows
No horizontal page scroll on any mobile viewport (320px-768px)
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes

userStories.title: Fix remaining hardcoded SVG colors and minor a11y gaps
userStories.description: PositionList sparkline uses hardcoded #10b981/#ef4444. Header live indicator missing aria-label. Fix these final consistency gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: PositionList sparkline colors use getComputedStyle to read CSS variables (or CSS color-mix fallback)
Zero hardcoded hex colors in any SVG component
Header live indicator has aria-label='Connection status: connected/disconnected'
AlertDropdown has aria-expanded and aria-haspopup='true'
All icon-only buttons have aria-label
axe-core audit shows zero critical or serious violations on Dashboard page
npx vitest run passes
npm run build passes
